title: Midjourney
abstract: Midjourney is a visual AI tool that turns text prompts into production-ready images, videos, and 3D assets. No design skills required — just type what you want.
abstract_zh: _midjourney啊midjourney，创作界的黑马！你还在为加班赶周报发愁吗？试试它吧！写报告也能像玩一样顺滑。不信？调Bug时，输入一句“*fix that bug like a pro*”，几分钟后bug就被优雅地解决了。快来加入我们，让创意与效率并行不悖！_
